---
title: ""
---

::: {.text-center}

<img src="usj-logo.png" style="width:150px; margin-bottom:10px;">

# 📄 Participant Consent Form

## Stakeholder Awareness Survey on the Z-Score System

:::

\
\

<div class="text-center">

<a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg" href="ECR_docs/consent_form.pdf" download style="font-size: 2rem; padding: 22px 82px; background-color:#03786E;">
  <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download
</a>

</div>
